    source
    @[simp]
    theorem Veir.BlockPtr.get!_OperationPtr_allocEmpty {OpInfo : Type} [HasOpInfo OpInfo] {ctx ctx' : IRContext OpInfo} {ty : OpInfo} {properties : HasOpInfo.propertiesOf ty} {op' : OperationPtr} {block : BlockPtr} (heq : OperationPtr.allocEmpty ctx ty properties = some (ctx', op')) :
    block.get! ctx' = block.get! ctx
    source
    theorem Veir.OperationPtr.get!_OperationPtr_allocEmpty {OpInfo : Type} [HasOpInfo OpInfo] {ctx ctx' : IRContext OpInfo} {ty : OpInfo} {properties : HasOpInfo.propertiesOf ty} {op' operation : OperationPtr} (heq : allocEmpty ctx ty properties = some (ctx', op')) :
    operation.get! ctx' = if operation = op' then Operation.empty ty properties else operation.get! ctx
    source
    theorem Veir.OperationPtr.getOpType!_OperationPtr_allocEmpty {OpInfo : Type} [HasOpInfo OpInfo] {ctx ctx' : IRContext OpInfo} {ty : OpInfo} {properties : HasOpInfo.propertiesOf ty} {op' operation : OperationPtr} (heq : allocEmpty ctx ty properties = some (ctx', op')) :
    operation.getOpType! ctx' = if operation = op' then ty else operation.getOpType! ctx
    source
    theorem Veir.OperationPtr.getNumResults!_OperationPtr_allocEmpty {OpInfo : Type} [HasOpInfo OpInfo] {ctx ctx' : IRContext OpInfo} {ty : OpInfo} {properties : HasOpInfo.propertiesOf ty} {op' operation : OperationPtr} (heq : allocEmpty ctx ty properties = some (ctx', op')) :
    operation.getNumResults! ctx' = if operation = op' then 0 else operation.getNumResults! ctx
    source
    theorem Veir.OpResultPtr.get!_OperationPtr_allocEmpty {OpInfo : Type} [HasOpInfo OpInfo] {ctx ctx' : IRContext OpInfo} {ty : OpInfo} {properties : HasOpInfo.propertiesOf ty} {op' : OperationPtr} {opResult : OpResultPtr} (heq : OperationPtr.allocEmpty ctx ty properties = some (ctx', op')) :
    opResult.get! ctx' = opResult.get! ctx
    source
    theorem Veir.OperationPtr.getNumOperands!_OperationPtr_allocEmpty {OpInfo : Type} [HasOpInfo OpInfo] {ctx ctx' : IRContext OpInfo} {ty : OpInfo} {properties : HasOpInfo.propertiesOf ty} {op' operation : OperationPtr} (heq : allocEmpty ctx ty properties = some (ctx', op')) :
    operation.getNumOperands! ctx' = if operation = op' then 0 else operation.getNumOperands! ctx
    source
    @[simp]
    theorem Veir.OpOperandPtr.get!_OperationPtr_allocEmpty {OpInfo : Type} [HasOpInfo OpInfo] {ctx ctx' : IRContext OpInfo} {ty : OpInfo} {properties : HasOpInfo.propertiesOf ty} {op' : OperationPtr} {opOperand : OpOperandPtr} (heq : OperationPtr.allocEmpty ctx ty properties = some (ctx', op')) :
    opOperand.get! ctx' = opOperand.get! ctx
    source
    @[simp]
    theorem Veir.OperationPtr.getProperties!_OperationPtr_allocEmpty {OpInfo : Type} [HasOpInfo OpInfo] {ctx ctx' : IRContext OpInfo} {ty : OpInfo} {properties : HasOpInfo.propertiesOf ty} {op' operation : OperationPtr} (heq : allocEmpty ctx ty properties = some (ctx', op')) :
    operation.getProperties! ctx' ty = if operation = op' then properties else operation.getProperties! ctx ty
    source
    theorem Veir.OperationPtr.getOperands!_OperationPtr_allocEmpty {OpInfo : Type} [HasOpInfo OpInfo] {ctx ctx' : IRContext OpInfo} {ty : OpInfo} {properties : HasOpInfo.propertiesOf ty} {op' operation : OperationPtr} (heq : allocEmpty ctx ty properties = some (ctx', op')) :
    operation.getOperands! ctx' = if operation = op' then #[] else operation.getOperands! ctx
    source
    theorem Veir.OperationPtr.getNumSuccessors!_OperationPtr_allocEmpty {OpInfo : Type} [HasOpInfo OpInfo] {ctx ctx' : IRContext OpInfo} {ty : OpInfo} {properties : HasOpInfo.propertiesOf ty} {op' operation : OperationPtr} (heq : allocEmpty ctx ty properties = some (ctx', op')) :
    operation.getNumSuccessors! ctx' = if operation = op' then 0 else operation.getNumSuccessors! ctx
    source
    @[simp]
    theorem Veir.BlockOperandPtr.get!_OperationPtr_allocEmpty {OpInfo : Type} [HasOpInfo OpInfo] {ctx ctx' : IRContext OpInfo} {ty : OpInfo} {properties : HasOpInfo.propertiesOf ty} {op' : OperationPtr} {blockOperand : BlockOperandPtr} (heq : OperationPtr.allocEmpty ctx ty properties = some (ctx', op')) :
    blockOperand.get! ctx' = blockOperand.get! ctx
    source
    theorem Veir.OperationPtr.getNumRegions!_OperationPtr_allocEmpty {OpInfo : Type} [HasOpInfo OpInfo] {ctx ctx' : IRContext OpInfo} {ty : OpInfo} {properties : HasOpInfo.propertiesOf ty} {op' operation : OperationPtr} (heq : allocEmpty ctx ty properties = some (ctx', op')) :
    operation.getNumRegions! ctx' = if operation = op' then 0 else operation.getNumRegions! ctx
    source
    @[simp]
    theorem Veir.OperationPtr.getRegion!_OperationPtr_allocEmpty {OpInfo : Type} [HasOpInfo OpInfo] {ctx ctx' : IRContext OpInfo} {ty : OpInfo} {properties : HasOpInfo.propertiesOf ty} {op' : OperationPtr} {i : Nat} {operation : OperationPtr} (heq : allocEmpty ctx ty properties = some (ctx', op')) :
    operation.getRegion! ctx' i = operation.getRegion! ctx i
    source
    @[simp]
    theorem Veir.BlockOperandPtrPtr.get!_OperationPtr_allocEmpty {OpInfo : Type} [HasOpInfo OpInfo] {ctx ctx' : IRContext OpInfo} {ty : OpInfo} {properties : HasOpInfo.propertiesOf ty} {op' : OperationPtr} {blockOperandPtr : BlockOperandPtrPtr} (heq : OperationPtr.allocEmpty ctx ty properties = some (ctx', op')) :
    blockOperandPtr.get! ctx' = blockOperandPtr.get! ctx

    block.getNumArguments! ctx' = block.getNumArguments! ctx

    region.get! ctx' = region.get! ctx
    source
    @[simp]
    theorem Veir.ValuePtr.getFirstUse!_OperationPtr_allocEmpty {OpInfo : Type} [HasOpInfo OpInfo] {ctx ctx' : IRContext OpInfo} {ty : OpInfo} {properties : HasOpInfo.propertiesOf ty} {op' : OperationPtr} {value : ValuePtr} (heq : OperationPtr.allocEmpty ctx ty properties = some (ctx', op')) :
    value.getFirstUse! ctx' = value.getFirstUse! ctx
    source
    @[simp]
    theorem Veir.ValuePtr.getType!_OperationPtr_allocEmpty {OpInfo : Type} [HasOpInfo OpInfo] {ctx ctx' : IRContext OpInfo} {ty : OpInfo} {properties : HasOpInfo.propertiesOf ty} {op' : OperationPtr} {value : ValuePtr} (h : OperationPtr.allocEmpty ctx ty properties = some (ctx', op')) :
    value.getType! ctx' = value.getType! ctx
    source
    @[simp]
    theorem Veir.OpOperandPtrPtr.get!_OperationPtr_allocEmpty {OpInfo : Type} [HasOpInfo OpInfo] {ctx ctx' : IRContext OpInfo} {ty : OpInfo} {properties : HasOpInfo.propertiesOf ty} {op' : OperationPtr} {opOperandPtr : OpOperandPtrPtr} (heq : OperationPtr.allocEmpty ctx ty properties = some (ctx', op')) :
    opOperandPtr.get! ctx' = opOperandPtr.get! ctx

    @[simp]
    theorem Veir.BlockPtr.get!_OperationPtr_dealloc {OpInfo : Type} [HasOpInfo OpInfo] {ctx : IRContext OpInfo} {operation' : OperationPtr} {hop' : operation'.InBounds ctx} {block : BlockPtr} :
    block.get! (operation'.dealloc ctx hop') = block.get! ctx
    source
    @[simp]
    theorem Veir.OperationPtr.get!_OperationPtr_dealloc {OpInfo : Type} [HasOpInfo OpInfo] {ctx : IRContext OpInfo} {operation' : OperationPtr} {hop' : operation'.InBounds ctx} {operation : OperationPtr} :
    operation.InBounds (operation'.dealloc ctx hop') → operation.get! (operation'.dealloc ctx hop') = operation.get! ctx
    source
    @[simp]
    theorem Veir.OperationPtr.getOpType!_OperationPtr_dealloc {OpInfo : Type} [HasOpInfo OpInfo] {ctx : IRContext OpInfo} {operation' : OperationPtr} {hop' : operation'.InBounds ctx} {operation : OperationPtr} :
    operation.InBounds (operation'.dealloc ctx hop') → operation.getOpType! (operation'.dealloc ctx hop') = operation.getOpType! ctx
    source
    @[simp]
    theorem Veir.OperationPtr.getProperties!_OperationPtr_dealloc {OpInfo : Type} [HasOpInfo OpInfo] {ctx : IRContext OpInfo} {operation' : OperationPtr} {hop' : operation'.InBounds ctx} {opCode : OpInfo} {operation : OperationPtr} :
    operation.InBounds (operation'.dealloc ctx hop') → operation.getProperties! (operation'.dealloc ctx hop') opCode = operation.getProperties! ctx opCode
    source
    @[simp]
    theorem Veir.OperationPtr.getNumResults!_OperationPtr_dealloc {OpInfo : Type} [HasOpInfo OpInfo] {ctx : IRContext OpInfo} {operation' : OperationPtr} {hop' : operation'.InBounds ctx} {operation : OperationPtr} :
    operation.InBounds (operation'.dealloc ctx hop') → operation.getNumResults! (operation'.dealloc ctx hop') = operation.getNumResults! ctx

    @[simp]
    theorem Veir.OpResultPtr.get!_OperationPtr_dealloc {OpInfo : Type} [HasOpInfo OpInfo] {ctx : IRContext OpInfo} {operation' : OperationPtr} {hop' : operation'.InBounds ctx} {opResult : OpResultPtr} :
    opResult.op.InBounds (operation'.dealloc ctx hop') → opResult.get! (operation'.dealloc ctx hop') = opResult.get! ctx
    source
    @[simp]
    theorem Veir.OperationPtr.getNumOperands!_OperationPtr_dealloc {OpInfo : Type} [HasOpInfo OpInfo] {ctx : IRContext OpInfo} {operation' : OperationPtr} {hop' : operation'.InBounds ctx} {operation : OperationPtr} :
    operation.InBounds (operation'.dealloc ctx hop') → operation.getNumOperands! (operation'.dealloc ctx hop') = operation.getNumOperands! ctx

    operation.getOperands! (operation'.setOperands ctx newOperands hop') = if operation = operation' then Array.map (fun (x : OpOperand) => x.value) newOperands else operation.getOperands! ctx

    operation.getNumResults! (operation'.pushResult ctx newResult hop') = if operation = operation' then operation.getNumResults! ctx + 1 else operation.getNumResults! ctx

    theorem Veir.OpResultPtr.get!_OperationPtr_pushResult {OpInfo : Type} [HasOpInfo OpInfo] {ctx : IRContext OpInfo} {operation' : OperationPtr} {newResult : OpResult} {hop' : operation'.InBounds ctx} {opResult : OpResultPtr} :

    value.getFirstUse! (operation'.pushResult ctx newResult hop') = if value = opResult (operation'.nextResult ctx ⋯) then newResult.firstUse else value.getFirstUse! ctx

    operation.get! (operation'.setProperties ctx newProperties inBounds hprop) = if operation = operation' then have __src := operation.get! ctx; { results := __src.results, prev := __src.prev, next := __src.next, parent := __src.parent, opType := operation'.getOpType! ctx, attrs := __src.attrs, properties := newProperties, blockOperands := __src.blockOperands, regions := __src.regions, operands := __src.operands } else operation.get! ctx

    operation.getProperties! (operation'.setProperties ctx newProperties inBounds hprop) opCode = if operation = operation' then if h : opCode = opCode' then ⋯ ▸ newProperties else default else operation.getProperties! ctx opCode

    block.get! (ptr'.set ctx newPtr hptr') = match ptr', hptr' with | OpOperandPtrPtr.valueFirstUse (ValuePtr.blockArgument arg), hptr' => if arg.block = block then have __src := block.get! ctx; { firstUse := __src.firstUse, prev := __src.prev, next := __src.next, parent := __src.parent, firstOp := __src.firstOp, lastOp := __src.lastOp, arguments := (block.get! ctx).arguments.set! arg.index (have __src := arg.get! ctx; { type := __src.type, firstUse := newPtr, index := __src.index, loc := __src.loc, owner := __src.owner }) } else block.get! ctx | x, hptr' => block.get! ctx

    operation.get! (ptr'.set ctx newPtr hptr') = match ptr', hptr' with | OpOperandPtrPtr.valueFirstUse (ValuePtr.opResult or), hptr' => if or.op = operation then have __src := operation.get! ctx; { results := (operation.get! ctx).results.set! or.index (have __src := or.get! ctx; { type := __src.type, firstUse := newPtr, index := __src.index, owner := __src.owner }), prev := __src.prev, next := __src.next, parent := __src.parent, opType := __src.opType, attrs := __src.attrs, properties := __src.properties, blockOperands := __src.blockOperands, regions := __src.regions, operands := __src.operands } else operation.get! ctx | OpOperandPtrPtr.valueFirstUse (ValuePtr.blockArgument ptr), hptr' => operation.get! ctx | OpOperandPtrPtr.operandNextUse operand, hptr' => if operand.op = operation then have __src := operation.get! ctx; { results := __src.results, prev := __src.prev, next := __src.next, parent := __src.parent, opType := __src.opType, attrs := __src.attrs, properties := __src.properties, blockOperands := __src.blockOperands, regions := __src.regions, operands := (operation.get! ctx).operands.set! operand.index (have __src := operand.get! ctx; { nextUse := newPtr, back := __src.back, owner := __src.owner, value := __src.value }) } else operation.get! ctx

    theorem Veir.BlockOperandPtrPtr.get!_BlockPtr_setArguments {OpInfo : Type} [HasOpInfo OpInfo] {ctx : IRContext OpInfo} {block' : BlockPtr} {newArguments : Array BlockArgument} {hblock' : block'.InBounds ctx} {blockOperandPtr : BlockOperandPtrPtr} :

    block.getNumArguments! (block'.setArguments ctx newArguments hblock') = if block = block' then newArguments.size else block.getNumArguments! ctx
    source
    theorem Veir.BlockArgumentPtr.get!_BlockPtr_setArguments {OpInfo : Type} [HasOpInfo OpInfo] {ctx : IRContext OpInfo} {block' : BlockPtr} {newArguments : Array BlockArgument} {hblock' : block'.InBounds ctx} {blockArg : BlockArgumentPtr} :
    blockArg.get! (block'.setArguments ctx newArguments hblock') = if blockArg.block = block' then newArguments[blockArg.index]! else blockArg.get! ctx

    value.getFirstUse! (block'.setArguments ctx newArguments hblock') = match value with | blockArgument arg => if arg.block = block' then newArguments[arg.index]!.firstUse else value.getFirstUse! ctx | opResult ptr => value.getFirstUse! ctx

    value.getType! (block'.setArguments ctx newArguments hblock') = match value with | blockArgument arg => if arg.block = block' then newArguments[arg.index]!.type else value.getType! ctx | opResult ptr => value.getType! ctx

    theorem Veir.BlockPtr.getNumArguments!_BlockPtr_pushArgument {OpInfo : Type} [HasOpInfo OpInfo] {ctx : IRContext OpInfo} {op : BlockPtr} {newOperand : BlockArgument} {block : BlockPtr} {hop : op.InBounds ctx} :
    block.getNumArguments! (op.pushArgument ctx newOperand hop) = if block = op then block.getNumArguments! ctx + 1 else block.getNumArguments! ctx
    source
    theorem Veir.BlockArgumentPtr.get!_BlockPtr_pushArgument {OpInfo : Type} [HasOpInfo OpInfo] {ctx : IRContext OpInfo} {block' : BlockPtr} {newArgument : BlockArgument} {hblock' : block'.InBounds ctx} {blockArg : BlockArgumentPtr} :
    blockArg.get! (block'.pushArgument ctx newArgument hblock') = if blockArg = block'.nextArgument! ctx then newArgument else blockArg.get! ctx

    value.getFirstUse! (block'.pushArgument ctx newArgument hblock') = if value = blockArgument { block := block', index := block'.getNumArguments! ctx } then newArgument.firstUse else value.getFirstUse! ctx
    source
    theorem Veir.ValuePtr.getType!_BlockPtr_pushArgument {OpInfo : Type} [HasOpInfo OpInfo] {ctx : IRContext OpInfo} {block' : BlockPtr} {newArgument : BlockArgument} {hblock' : block'.InBounds ctx} {value : ValuePtr} :
    value.getType! (block'.pushArgument ctx newArgument hblock') = if value = blockArgument { block := block', index := block'.getNumArguments! ctx } then newArgument.type else value.getType! ctx

    theorem Veir.OpOperandPtrPtr.get!_BlockPtr_pushArgument {OpInfo : Type} [HasOpInfo OpInfo] {ctx : IRContext OpInfo} {block' : BlockPtr} {newArgument : BlockArgument} {hblock' : block'.InBounds ctx} {opOperandPtr : OpOperandPtrPtr} :
    opOperandPtr.get! (block'.pushArgument ctx newArgument hblock') = if opOperandPtr = valueFirstUse (ValuePtr.blockArgument { block := block', index := block'.getNumArguments! ctx }) then newArgument.firstUse else opOperandPtr.get! ctx
